procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1572
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1572 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1572 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1572'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1572 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1572 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 5 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1572'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1572 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 5

sigma.title: Communication To LocaltoNet Tunneling Service Initiated - Linux
Communication To Ngrok Tunneling Service - Linux
Network Connection Initiated To BTunnels Domains
Network Connection Initiated To Cloudflared Tunnels Domains
Network Connection Initiated To DevTunnels Domain

osquery.name: t1572_c2_sockets
osquery.query_text: SELECT p.pid, p.name, p.path, p.cmdline, s.remote_address, s.remote_port, s.state FROM process_open_sockets s JOIN processes p ON s.pid = p.pid WHERE s.remote_address != '' AND s.remote_address != '127.0.0.1' AND s.remote_address != '::1' AND s.state = 'ESTABLISHED' LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1572_dns_cache
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, fd, socket, remote_address, remote_port FROM process_open_sockets WHERE remote_port = 53 LIMIT 50;
